item.description: Many stores are closed or have restricted hours over the long weekend - here’s everything you need to know.

item.description: The music legend was ambushed at an appointment.

item.description: Four astronauts are aboard the Artemis II.

item.description: The Aussie was shattered as potentially her final chance at European glory was ended in controversial circumstances.

item.description: The shock departure comes less than 12 months after he returned to the role for a second stint.

item.title: Prime minister Anthony Albanese announces crackdown on gambling in bid to reduce exposure to harms
item.description: ‘What we don’t want is kids growing up thinking that footy and gambling are the same thing.’

item.description: ‘We believe this has the potential to reduce the number of people developing dementia in the long run.’

item.title: Rare outbreak of nasty respiratory infection diphtheria prompts vaccination calls for kids
item.description: The disease was a common cause of death among kids until the 1940s.

item.description: The Matildas captain is leaving England for a new start with a high-profile club.

item.title: DNA testing confirms Ted Bundy killed Utah teen Lauran Ann Aime in 1974 cold case
item.description: After more than 50 years, an unsolved murder of a Utah teenager has been linked to the serial killer.

item.title: Australia faces ‘sharp recession’ if US escalates Middle East war
item.description: If US President Donald Trump continues the war, Australians may see a bigger financial crisis.

item.description: The vision shows the legendary golfer doing an embarrassing sobriety test, as detectives empty his pocket.

item.description: A former personal lawyer of Trump’s will now lead the Justice Department.

item.description: The Aussie driver’s pain is still there for everyone to see .. and now he’s revealed all.

item.description: ‘2004 was a good year, but your Gmail address doesn’t need to be stuck in it.’

item.description: The country is using a new tactic as Moscow tries to bypass Ukrainian air defences.

item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Anthony Albanese confirms Singapore trip to meet with PM over fuel
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: NASA’s Artemis II astronauts break 56-year-old record for distance from Earth
item.description: The crew will be plunged into darkness and communications blackouts as they fly around the moon.

item.title: Parramatta set to request salary cap exception because of multiple injuries due to ‘foul play’
item.description: Jason Ryles says it would only be ‘common sense’ after one of his players was rushed to hospital.

item.title: Aussie golf ace Jason Day takes aim at ‘selfish’ hero Tiger Woods after DUI charge
item.description: ‘It just shows the human element of someone that is struggling with some sort of an addiction.’

item.title: Influential Olympic icon Sir Craig Reedie dies aged 84: ‘He did not suffer fools’
item.description: ‘He was in the lead tank during every battle.’

item.title: Severe tropical cyclone Maila to move towards Queensland coastline this week
item.description: Meteorologists are ‘confident’ the storm is heading towards the coastline.

item.title: ‘Painless’ needle-free flu vaccine for kids released for free under New South Wales Nasal Spray Influenza Vaccination Program
item.description: The painless option is offered amid a spike in hospital admissions and waning faith in the vaccine.

item.title: Chris Scott airs honest thoughts on AFL wildcard weekend in rare swipe: ‘No good reason except cash’
item.description: ‘See, this is why I shouldn’t do this so close to the game. Get me out of here. Our media manager is sweating.’

item.title: Army reservist charged after allegedly working as a drone operator for Ukraine during war with Russia
item.description: The 25-year-old faces a maximum penalty of 20 years in prison.

item.title: Cardi B’s ex rapper Offset shot outside popular Florida casino
item.description: Rapper Offset has been shot in a frightening encounter near a popular Florida casino.

item.title: TV star Grant Denyer shares health update after Bathurst 6 Hour crash
item.description: The charismatic presenter and game-show host was involved in a three-car collision.

item.title: Nissan's new rugged off-road SUV to offer petrol and hybrid V6s – report
item.description: Nissan is still developing a new off-road SUV, but it'll ditch electric power in favour of a petrol V6 and a new hybrid.

item.title: Multi-vehicle crash in Brisbane involving stolen car injuries six, including four teenagers
item.description: The crash has closed a major roadway.

item.title: Ben Roberts-Smith arrested at Sydney Airport over war crime murder allegations
item.description: The 47-year-old former war hero had been under investigation for five years.

item.title: Toyota LandCruiser Prado gets new feature to combat car theft
item.description: Toyota has introduced new anti-theft measures for the Prado in Japan, including a remote engine disable function.

item.title: Sydney socialite Annabelle Price found dead inside home
item.description: The 34-year-old was a mother to two children.

item.title: Petrol prices fall as diesel rises despite excise cut
item.description: Petrol prices have dropped sharply in the past week, but diesel prices have continued to climb despite government relief measures.

item.title: 2026 MG 4 EV Urban: Long Range priced from $34,990 drive-away
item.description: MG has confirmed pricing for the top-spec, long-range version of its new MG 4 EV Urban small hatchback.

item.title: ATO rolls out in-app call verification to help Australians spot scams as tax time fraud surges
item.description: Scams peak during tax season with almost 7500 impersonation frauds reported in last July alone.

item.title: Michael Voss blocks out Blues blowtorch ahead of Gather Round test: ‘Get on with it’
item.description: ‘I’m not distracted off anything other than just getting the best out of the team.’

item.title: Parramatta captain Mitch Moses cops official warning from NRL after ref incidents
item.description: The Eels star made contact with Peter Gough more than once during the fiery clash.

item.title: 2026 MG 4 Electric: Update coming 'very soon' for familiar EV hatch
item.description: An updated MG 4 EV is headed to Australia soon to sit alongside the newly launched MG 4 EV Urban. Details are still TBC, but the UK provides a guide.

item.title: 2026 MG 4 EV Urban review: Quick drive
item.description: MG's new cut-price EV feels anything but budget, with impressive driving manners and a fulsome spec sheet for not a lot of money.

item.title: Olympic cyclist Rohan Dennis speaks out after ‘tone-deaf’ social media post causes backlash following death of wife Melissa Hoskins
item.description: ‘I loved Melissa and the last thing I ever wanted was to hurt her.’

item.title: Concern growing among Richmond players over Punt Road surface amid lengthy injury list
item.description: ‘The club vehemently deny this, but there is no doubt coming from within the players.’

item.title: Travellers on alert as twin cyclones threaten multiple South Pacific islands
item.description: Tourists are advised to check how flights and travel plans will be impacted.
